title: How To Use Andrej Karapathy's Knowledge Wiki Approach for Product Research
description: Learn how to apply Andrej Karpathy's viral knowledge base methodology to strengthen your product research process. This practical guide translates an AI expert's documentation approach into actionable UX research strategies, helping teams organize and synthesize insights more effectively.

title: Practical Guide for Creating Animated Effects with Claude Code
description: Discover 10 actionable rules for leveraging Claude Code to design smooth, engaging animated effects in your digital products. Includes three ready-to-use prompt templates that let designers prototype interactive animations without deep coding knowledge.
